comment.body:
its secret is that it should be cooked in butter or pig fat (original folkloric is pig fat), and you have to move the pan constantly, so the breadcrumb will elevate from the meat.
the meat must be like paper, and it should be cured in milk with rosemary and garlic for at least 4 hours
